payload.answer: Saved the article reference and your stated reason, but I could not save any article content because the fetch returned a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no article-derived entities or claims were resolved.

memory_cards.statement: The user wants to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed only the URL and user-provided reason.
Did not extract article claims because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later if the network error may be transient.
